name: Almost Dungeon
short_description: Almost Dungeon reverses the roles by making you play a Dragon protecting his Dungeon. Arrange the corridors into a labyrinth of your liking and fool the adventurer who dared to enter your lair. Place traps in his way as fast as possible to get rid of him before he finds and slays you !
detailed_description:
Almost Dungeon reverses the roles by making you play a Dragon protecting his Dungeon. Arrange the corridors into a labyrinth of your liking and fool the adventurer who dared to enter your lair. Place traps in his way as fast as possible to get rid of him before he finds and slays you !

Story Mode

  • 4 decks of cards with creative synergies to master
  • 4 thematic dungeons to defend
  • 30+ unique adventurers to meet and challenge

Arcade Mode

  • an infinite flow of challengers with ever-growing strength and speed
  • combinatorial adventurer AI affected by 4 classes and 6 personality traits
  • 50+ hand made level designs that put your building skills to the test
